title: The Seas Beneath
writer: Dudley Nichols, James Parker Jr., William Collier Sr.
actors: George O'Brien, Marion Lessing, Mona Maris
plot: At the end of WWI the US Navy camouflages a battleship as a harmless schooner and sails for the Canary Islands to confront a notoriously effective German U-boat. No one sees the US submarine secretly escorting the schooner.
